summary: Key APAC revenue data points collected for forecasting Q4 2025
content:
Annual 2024 APAC headline revenue: $56.82B (from MarketScreener)
Annual 2024 EMEA: $102B, Other Americas: $20.42B, US: $170B, Total: ~$349B

Quarterly APAC headline revenue (from Nasdaq article):
- Q1 2024: $13.29B
- Q2 2024: $13.82B

From question description (constant currency):
- Q3 2025 APAC CC: $17.691B, +19.28% YoY
- Derived Q3 2024 APAC CC: $14.831B

Company total quarterly revenue:
- Q3 2024: $88.27B
- Q4 2024: $96.469B
- Q1 2025: $90.234B
- Q2 2025: $96.428B
- Q3 2025: $102.346B

Implied Q4 2024 APAC headline = $56.82B - $13.29B - $13.82B - Q3 2024 headline
Need to estimate Q3 2024 APAC headline to derive Q4 2024.
